inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net cash from operating activities $10,737k / 68,364,945 shares outstanding Dec 31, 2025 (40-F ex99.2 consolidated statements of cash flows)
inputs.normalization_note: Royalty/stream model: owner cash approximates operating cash flow; minimal sustaining capex. FY2025 includes new net precious metal streaming income ($4.6M) and elevated gold prices. Management guides $28-32M receipts for 2026F (corporate presentation) — not in Lawrence FCF starting point.

bear.notes: Gold/metal prices mean-revert; receipts flat; G&A ~$4.9M persists vs ~$10M gross profit; credit facility $6.7M year-end; multiple compresses

base.notes: Portfolio ramps from 12 producing assets and Sept 2025 Global Gold Portfolio; conservative vs management 2026F $28-32M receipt guide [Assumption]

bull.notes: Management 2026F receipt guide achieved; development book converts; GDXJ inclusion improves liquidity; commodity prices hold

optionality_gate.notes: Shareholders equity $107.0M / 68.4M shares = ~$1.57/sh at Dec 31, 2025; 67 development/exploration assets not in Lawrence FCF0. Credit facility $6.7M drawn at year-end per filing; press cites full repayment early 2026 [HUMAN REVIEW].

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Royalty interests carried at cost less depletion; economic value tied to metal prices and operator reserves (40-F ex99.2 Note 2(e))

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Corporate presentation June 2026: 67 development & exploration assets vs 12 producing; Global Gold Portfolio acquired Sept 2025 for $60M

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single royalty/stream operating model; FY2025 gross profit $10.1M before G&A (40-F ex99.2)

option_scan.question: Backlog not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Management 2026F receipt guide $28-32M vs FY2025 $16.6M receipts (corporate presentation; shareholder letter)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes disclosed in FY2025 financial statements

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No regular dividend; special distributions not in base year

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 record metal prices and new streaming income embedded in royalty receipts $16.6M (6-K ex99.1 Mar 30, 2026)

nav_overlay_options.label: Development & exploration royalty book (67 assets)
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: 67 non-producing assets; Sept 2025 $60M Global Gold Portfolio not fully in FY2025 cash flow — P-weighted overlay only

nav_overlay_options.label: 2026 receipt guidance ($28-32M) vs FY2025 actual
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: Partial credit for volume ramp from acquired streams; not in Lawrence FCF0 starting point

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: 12 producing assets plus Sept 2025 Global Gold Portfolio and Australian stream ramps (Plutonic East, Boundary) drive receipt growth; G&A leverage if receipts scale toward 2026F guide
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Sustained metal price decline or operator delays on top development assets (Greenstone, Bowdens, South Railroad per presentation)
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: 2026F $28-32M receipt guide achieved with accretive M&A below hurdle

catalyst_paths.impact: Volume growth from acquired streams and producing Aussie gold assets
Liquidity and passive fund demand (shareholder letter Feb 2026)
Receipts flat; G&A burden persists; development book delays

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

top_dissents.label: Joel Greenblatt
top_dissents.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
